name: WarPigs Craft Kitchen
tagline: Life's too short to eat bad barbecue.
seoDescription: WarPigs (a.k.a. BBQ Hustlers) is a craft barbecue catering and pop-up operation in Sonoma County, led by pitmaster Larry Hillix since 2011. 12-hour smoked pulled pork, brisket, ribs, and house-made sausage for events, weddings, and brewery & winery pop-ups. Call (707) 508-5551.

hero.heading: Craft Barbecue, Smoked Low & Slow
hero.subheading: Pitmaster Larry Hillix brings 12-hour smoked pulled pork, brisket, ribs, and house-made sausage to Sonoma County through catering and pop-ups.

highlights: Pitmaster-owned by Larry Hillix, smoking craft barbecue since 2011
12-hour smoked pulled pork, plus brisket, ribs, and house-made sausage
Scratch-made sides and seasonal California ingredients
Full-service catering for weddings, corporate, and private events
Pop-ups and collaborations with local breweries and wineries

about.heading: Real Craft Barbecue, Built on Passion
body: WarPigs Craft Kitchen started in 2011, when owner and pitmaster Larry Hillix decided Sonoma County was ready for serious barbecue. What began as a roving catering and pop-up operation grew into a beloved local name, built on a simple belief: life's too short to eat bad barbecue. A special blend of spices and rubs, inspired by the legendary Gary Park of G's Slow Smoked BBQ, became the backbone of the WarPigs style.

The kitchen specializes in modern Americana cuisine rooted in comfort, craft, and regional influence. Drawing from Southern smokehouse traditions and seasonal California ingredients, Larry and the team slow-smoke their meats for hours and make their sides from scratch. The result is barbecue that is both approachable and memorable, from the 12-hour pulled pork and brisket to the fried Brussels sprouts and loaded dirty fries that regulars rave about.

Today WarPigs Craft Kitchen serves the community from 8492 S. Gravenstein Hwy in Cotati, while continuing to cater weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings and to host pop-ups with breweries and wineries throughout Sonoma County. Customers describe the food as 'seriously delicious' and praise Larry's contagious passion for the craft.

services.title: Slow-Smoked Meats
services.description: 12-hour smoked pulled pork, brisket, ribs, house-made sausage, smoked chicken wings, and smoked chicken, cooked low and slow with a signature blend of rubs.

services.title: Sandwiches & Plates
services.description: Pulled pork sandwich on brioche, BBQ pork sandwich, spicy chicken sandwich, fried chicken, sliders, and a house-ground burger served with generous portions.

services.title: Loaded Dirty Fries
services.description: Fries piled with cheese, BBQ sauce, slow-smoked pulled pork, and coleslaw, one of the most-loved items on the menu.

services.title: Scratch-Made Sides
services.description: Fried Brussels sprouts with balsamic, parmesan, and bacon, baked beans, potato salad, coleslaw, and other made-from-scratch favorites.

services.title: Event & Wedding Catering
services.description: Full-service catering tailored to your guest count and vision for weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings, with perfectly smoked brisket and pulled pork.

services.title: Brewery & Winery Pop-Ups
services.description: Regular pop-ups and collaborations with local breweries and wineries, including stops like Iron Ox Brewing, bringing craft barbecue across Sonoma County.
